reviews.comment:
Los baños super limpios y con sensores en el techo para saber si están ocupados o libres. Con jabón, alcohol en gel y secador de manos.
Para comprar el lugar es chico y la fila se hace larga.
Lugar para estacionar adelante y atras.
El cafe es feo (horrible), las gaseosas estaban bien frias.

(Translated by Google)
The restrooms were spotless and had sensors on the ceiling to indicate availability. They were equipped with soap, hand sanitizer, and hand dryers.
The checkout area is small, and the line gets long. There's parking available both in front and back.
The coffee was awful, but the sodas were nice and cold.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR4a01XS2pRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Con los años fue quedando antigua. Hay YPF que la superan ampliamente. Igualmente sigo parando ahí por tradición cada vez que voy a la costa.

(Translated by Google)
Over the years it's become outdated. There are YPF stations that are far superior. Even so, I still stop there out of tradition whenever I go to the coast.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN4Xzh5eDlRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Solía ser la parada obligada incluso cuando no estaba la autovía. En invierno, comer en ese comedor enorme frente a los leños esos oejerreyes o milanesas eran como tocar el cielo. Ahora quedó un poco escondido tras el puente de  ruta. Tiene teles y esta mas modernizado. Pero sus hamburguesas y lomitos siguen siendo buenos al igual que las facturas

(Translated by Google)
It used to be a must-stop, even before the highway was built. In winter, eating in that huge dining room by the wood fires—those ojerreyes or milanesas—was like heaven. Now it's a bit hidden behind the highway overpass. It has TVs and is more modernized. But its hamburgers and steak sandwiches are still good, as are the pastries.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN4emQtUDN3RRAB
